task.description: The task description/instructions. For local LLMs: Be specific! Include exact file paths, concrete changes, and clear acceptance criteria. Example: "Add unit test for CalculateTotal method in tests/OrderTests.cs covering null input case"

working_directory.description: Working directory for the task (defaults to current directory)

priority.description: Task priority (higher = processed first when queued)

provider.description: Execution provider (codex, claude-cli, ollama, hashline-ollama, anthropic, deepinfra, groq, hyperbolic). Defaults to configured default provider.

model.description: Model to use. For ollama: e.g., mistral:7b, qwen2.5-coder:7b (use list_ollama_models to see available). For codex: e.g., gpt-5.3-codex-spark (passed as -m flag).
